name_en: Top-tier factory set with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier factory set with full packaging
White in stock!!️
Factory leather with sheepskin lining Lady latest flip-flop sheepskin five-compartment, classic upgrade 📤, changed the zipper design that scratched hands before, it's really thoughtful 😘, after being hurt by various zipper bags, I really love the new five-compartment flip-flop design, full capacity 💯, looks good handheld or crossbody, retro quilted pattern and timeless bag shape, a classic bag every girl deserves 👜
size:24*11*20cm
